generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you know? While politicians debate expensive new weapons systems, our communities are still unprepared for real threats. Basic civil defense measures like emergency shelters and public alert systems save lives - yet funding keeps getting cut. Why aren't we prioritizing protection for everyday people? #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
